title: thelypteris changbaishanensis
intro: Thelypteris changbaishanensis, also known as Changbaishan maiden fern, is a species of fern that is native to China. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs and sore throats, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris changbaishanensis is often used in decoctions or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
